P·WHIFF: Green=above LG avg (pitcher advantage) · Red=below LG avg. MATCH = pitcher whiff × (opp÷LG) — how well this pitch works against this lineup
K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data
Signal
Play the over 6.5.2 units
High-confidence edge — 72% model conviction at 8.8K vs 6.5 line.
Burns generates genuine swing-and-miss (33.2% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. CH is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. PIT is an excellent matchup — 27.38% MIX-K well above LG. Lineup swings against his mix. He's cooled off recently — factor into your confidence.
Bet wins if
✓CH converts two-strike counts (39% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Elite swing-and-miss stuff (33.2% WHF) — Ks can stack quickly when he's on
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.8 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

Signal
Play the over 7.5.2 units
High-confidence edge — 72% model conviction at 9.9K vs 7.5 line.
Cease generates genuine swing-and-miss (36.5% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. SW is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. TEX is roughly neutral — 23.06% MIX-K close to league average. Moderate variance (σ2.0K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Edge lives at the 7.5 alt line vs the 8.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓SW converts two-strike counts (43% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Elite swing-and-miss stuff (36.5% WHF) — Ks can stack quickly when he's on
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.8 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗Control is a problem (4.0 BB/9) — walks eat PA and he works from behind in counts

Signal
Over 5.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 6.5K vs 5.5. 61% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Yamamoto is above average on whiff rate (28.6%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. SL is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. SD is roughly neutral — 22.4% MIX-K close to league average. Moderate variance (σ2.1K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Edge lives at the 5.5 alt line vs the 5.0 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓He logs his average 6.6 IP — enough PA to let Ks accumulate
✓SL converts two-strike counts (34% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Sharp command (1.7 BB/9) — every PA counts and he's not giving away bases
Bet loses if
✗Variance on any given start (σ2.1K) — projection is a median, not a floor

P·WHIFF: Green=above LG avg (pitcher advantage) · Red=below LG avg. MATCH = pitcher whiff × (opp÷LG) — how well this pitch works against this lineup
K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data
Signal
Lean over 5.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Marginal over edge (6.2K vs 5.5), 57% conviction — take it reduced.
Griffin sits around league average on whiff rate (24.7%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. FS is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. BAL is a good matchup — 26.46% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
Bet wins if
✓FS converts two-strike counts (29% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.8 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

P·WHIFF: Green=above LG avg (pitcher advantage) · Red=below LG avg. MATCH = pitcher whiff × (opp÷LG) — how well this pitch works against this lineup
K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data
Signal
Lean under 5.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (4.3K vs 5.5), 33% confidence — lean only.
Cole is below average on swing-and-miss (18.6% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. SI is a serviceable finishing pitch, not dominant in two-strike counts. BOS is roughly neutral — 22.78% MIX-K close to league average. High variance (σ2.7K) — ceiling and floor are both real.
⚠ Edge lives at the 5.5 alt line vs the 5.0 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Elite first-pitch strike rate (68%) — batters put the ball in play early, not deep counts
✓Short average outing (5.4 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗K/9 of 8.1 means the ceiling exists — a long outing can push over the number
✗High variance (σ2.7K) — his ceiling can blow past the line on a good day

P·WHIFF: Green=above LG avg (pitcher advantage) · Red=below LG avg. MATCH = pitcher whiff × (opp÷LG) — how well this pitch works against this lineup
K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data
Signal
Lean under 4.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (3.5K vs 4.5), 30% confidence — lean only.
Young is below average on swing-and-miss (21.6% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. CU is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. WSH is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 19.9%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Very consistent output (σ1.5K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Edge lives at the 4.5 alt line vs the 4.0 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 6.5) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Elite first-pitch strike rate (65%) — batters put the ball in play early, not deep counts
✓Short average outing (5.7 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗CU is an out pitch (26% putaway) — if he gets deep in counts, Ks follow

K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data
Signal
Lean under 6.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (5.0K vs 6.5), 28% confidence — lean only.
Jones generates genuine swing-and-miss (33.3% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. CH is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. CIN is a good matchup — 25.58% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. Very consistent output (σ1.0K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Edge lives at the 6.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Short average outing (4.1 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗K/9 of 9.3 means the ceiling exists — a long outing can push over the number
✗Low FPS (56%) — he works from behind, counts go deep, Ks can build late
✗CH is an out pitch (39% putaway) — if he gets deep in counts, Ks follow

Model projects 4.8K vs 4.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Webb is below average on swing-and-miss (20.6% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. FC is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. ATL is a mild headwind — 21.52% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.

K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data

Model projects 4.4K vs 4.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Elder sits around league average on whiff rate (22.5%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. CH is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. SF is a mild headwind — 22.1% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. Moderate variance (σ2.4K) — no major consistency flags.

Model projects 2.9K vs 3.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Vasquez sits around league average on whiff rate (25%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. Putaway pitch (SL) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. LAD is roughly neutral — 23.2% MIX-K close to league average. Moderate variance (σ1.7K) — no major consistency flags.

K%/Whiff% = batter actual rate vs this pitcher's exact pitch mix, weighted by usage. Green = pitcher advantage · Red = pitcher disadvantage. Coverage dot: ●high ●mod ●low ●no data
Signal
Pass.Pass
Model projects 6.0K vs 7.0 — edge too thin to take a side.
Perkins is above average on whiff rate (28.7%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. FC is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. LAA is roughly neutral — 23.3% MIX-K close to league average. Very consistent output (σ1.4K) — model projection is reliable here.

Model v9.9
K Props · F5 · NRFI · methodology + weightings · v9.9 tiering
📈 Live Performance — through 2026-06-26 · 105 bets
60.0%
WIN RATE
63–42
+4.8%
ROI · $+499
MAE 2.05K
1.64σ
EDGE CONF
n=105 · need more
Overall 63–42 · bias +0.68K
60%
Overs 29–15 · bias +0.70K
65%
Unders 34–27 · bias +0.66K
55%
STRONG 6–2
75%
MOD 13–7
65%
LEAN O 12–5
71%
LEAN U 31–26
54%
⚠ Bias note: Projections run +0.68K overall. Under bias +0.66K — actuals beat proj by ~0.7K on avg when fading. Overs 66% vs unders 56%. Option A + blended LG baseline (Jun 26) reducing bias over time.
EDGE CONF 1.64σ = standard deviations above random chance (52% breakeven). >1.96σ → 95% confident the edge is real · >2.58σ → 99% confident. Current 105 bets: 95% CI = [50.6%–69.4%].
❓ CAP — Model Confidence Score
CAP = overall strength of evidence (0–100%). NOT win probability — measures how aligned the signals are. Used in tiering: STRONG ≥ 62% · MOD ≥ 58%.
≥80% all signals align · 55–70% edge exists, mixed — size down · <55% thin confidence.
① P(over) — Poisson probability of clearing the line
~40%
② Edge size — raw Ks above / below the line
~30%
③ σ stability — variance penalty on volatile pitchers
~20%
④ Blend quality — depth of L10 data vs prior weight
~10%
⚡ K Props — Strikeout Projection v9.9
6-step formula — runs in this order every session:
① Normalise L10: adj_k = raw_k × (21.51 / opp_K%)
② Scale K/9 to avg IP per start
③ σ-blend: σ≤1.2 → 75/25 · σ≤2.2 → 70/30 · σ>2.2 → 58/42 (L10/K9)
④ 5-factor base_proj (whiff · fps · putaway · arsenal · park)
⑤ OPP BLEND: 60% MIX-K% (normalised) + 40% BBRef K%
⑥ rm_raw = opp_kpct_eff ÷ LG_blend · HARD ow=1.00 · EASY ow=0.65
Adj L10 base · opp-normalised · σ-driven blend
32%
Whiff% vs lg avg (25%) — strongest Statcast K predictor
22%
OPP BLEND: 60% MIX-K% (arsenal-normalised) + 40% BBRef
18%
Putaway% vs lg avg (19%) — 2-strike whiff rate
11%
FPS% vs lg avg (63%) — command drives deep counts
9%
Park factor (2.0 − park) — small but real
6%
σ variance penalty — volatile pitchers capped lower
2%
MIX-K% Option A: batter K% per pitch type ÷ LG avg for that type → rescaled to 21.51%. Removes suppression on SI=11.96% / CU=14.09% pitchers vs SW=29.44% / CB=29.73%. Constants: 4S=21.98% · SI=11.96% · CH=23.14% · CU=14.09% · SL=27.12% · SW=29.44% · CB=29.73% · SF=25.88%
STRONG edge≥+1.5K · P(O)≥25% · CAP≥62% · 2u · MOD edge≥+0.5K · P(O)≥15% · CAP≥58% · 1–1.5u
LEAN O edge≥+0.5K · CAP≥45% · 0.5u · LEAN U edge≤−1.0K · CAP≥20% · 0.5u
UNDER edge≤−1.0K · CAP≥58% · 1u (1.5u if CAP≥65 + σ≤2)
🔴 F5 — First 5 Innings v9.9
blended_ERA = 0.65 × season_ERA + 0.35 × L3_ERA (live from kdata)
sp_r = (blended_ERA / 4.50) × 2.5 × park × fps_adj
lineup_r = (wRC+ / 100) × (L10_RPG / 4.35) × 2.42
F5_runs = sp_r × 0.50 + lineup_r × 0.50
SP: blended ERA (65% season + 35% L3) × park × FPS adj
50%
Lineup wRC+ vs pitcher handedness (lg avg 100)
25%
Opponent L10 R/G vs lg avg (4.35)
25%
🎯 NRFI / YRFI — First Inning v9.9
λ_base = f(ERA, FPS%, WHIP, park)
woba_ratio = top4_lineup_avg_woba ÷ 0.318 (LG avg)
λ_adj = λ_base × (0.70 + 0.30 × woba_ratio)
P(NRFI) = e^(−λ_away) × e^(−λ_home)
Pitcher: ERA · FPS% · WHIP → Poisson λ base
70%
Top-4 lineup woba ÷ 0.318 LG avg (Savant, fresh daily)
30%
NRFI ≥62% · NRFI lean 57–61% · Skip 43–56% · YRFI ≤42%
Top-4 hitters with Savant woba. Danger ≥.400 · Watch ≥.360 · Manageable <.360
📐 Implied Odds Box
Poisson (λ = proj K) → probability + American odds per alt line threshold.
BET row = our recommended line. MKT row = market main (~+100 crossover).
⚠ bet · mkt N in card summary = our line differs from market — be on the right number.
P(K ≥ n) = 1 − Σ(k=0 to n−1) [e^−λ × λ^k / k!]
P≥50%: −round(P/(1−P)×100) · P<50%: +round((1−P)/P×100)
📡 Data Sources
✓ Real (API) — L10 K counts · pitch counts · season ERA/K9/BB9/WHIP · FanDuel alt lines + odds
✓ Savant CSV — batter woba/K%/PA per pitch type (572 batters) · pitcher arsenal whiff%/FPS%/putaway%
⚠ Researched — team wRC+ · L10 R/G · park factors · bullpen ERA · BBRef K% splits (updated Jun 8)
✗ Gaps — L10 opponents (API returns ? → falls back to raw avg) · live Statcast splits · real-time lineup changes
↑
